# Claude Code prompt — [5A.2] Quote PDF repeating-header + acceptance page-break fix (fix-forward)

*Paste everything below the line into Claude Code. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-25.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow
it. This is a small **fix-forward PR** for roadmap §5A.2 (Quote PDF). The
Quote-PDF migration (PR #221) is already merged and the roadmap item is ✅ —
this PR only lands a CSS fix that the squash merge missed.

## Background

PR #221 (`feat/5a2-quote-pdf-html`) squash-merged into `main`. **After** that
merge, commit **`70b4d98`** was pushed to the feature branch in response to
Codex review comments. It contains two CSS fixes to the HTML quote builder:

1. **Repeating header** — make the teal "INITIAL SERVICES" header band
   `position: fixed` so it repeats on **every** rendered page, including the
   Terms & Conditions overflow page.
2. **Acceptance block** — wrap the ACCEPTANCE section with
   `break-inside: avoid` so the signature block never splits across a page
   break.

Because `70b4d98` landed after the squash merge, it never reached `main`.
Cowork smoke-tested the current `main` output and confirmed the gap: in both
regenerated sample PDFs the header band appears on pages 1–3 but **page 4 (the
T&C overflow page) has no header at all** — no header band, no "Electronic
document" block. This PR fixes that, and only that.

## Phase 0 — pre-work

- `git fetch origin`.
- Branch off `main`: `fix/quote-pdf-repeating-header`.
- Conflict check (`git log --oneline --all -- <file>`) on the files you will
  touch: the HTML quote builder (`quote-html.builder.ts` — the file with the
  `css()` block), `docs/samples/sample-quote-tender-level.pdf`,
  `docs/samples/sample-quote-with-overlay.pdf`, `progress.md`, `roadmap.md`.

## Phase 1 — recover and apply commit 70b4d98

- Primary: `git cherry-pick 70b4d98`.
- If the commit object is not reachable: `git fetch origin feat/5a2-quote-pdf-html`
  and cherry-pick from there.
- If that branch no longer exists on origin: re-create the two CSS changes by
  hand in the builder's `css()` block — `position: fixed` on the header band,
  `break-inside: avoid` on the acceptance wrapper — and **stop and show the
  diff for confirmation before continuing.**
- **Inspect the diff before proceeding** (`git show 70b4d98`): confirm it is
  confined to the two CSS changes described above in the HTML quote builder.
  If it touches anything else unexpected, stop and report.
- If the header/acceptance fixes were split across more than one commit on the
  feature branch, bring all of them.
- If the cherry-pick conflicts, resolve it preserving intent — `main`'s builder
  is logically identical to the pre-`70b4d98` state, so the only content that
  should change is those two CSS rules.

## Phase 2 — regenerate the sample PDFs

- Regenerate both sample quote PDFs the same way PR #221 produced them (the
  IS-T020 tender-level quote, and its `ClientQuote` rendered with overlay),
  overwriting `docs/samples/sample-quote-tender-level.pdf` and
  `docs/samples/sample-quote-with-overlay.pdf`.
- Confirm each renders without error and is 4 pages.
- **Verify the fix concretely:** extract per-page text from each regenerated
  PDF and confirm the header text (`INITIAL SERVICES` and
  `Demolition Licence: 2328018`) now appears on **page 4** as well as pages
  1–3. Before this fix it was absent from page 4.
- Commit the regenerated PDFs in this PR so the repo's samples reflect the
  fixed output. State both paths in the PR body for Cowork + Sean's visual
  sign-off.

## Phase 3 — gate and docs

- Run the full §6 pre-PR CI checklist. The `api` job (lint,
  `test:api:serial` incl. the PDF integration tests, `compliance:smoke`) must
  be green. Chrome provisioning for the PDF tests is already handled by the
  explicit `puppeteer browsers install chrome` CI step from PR #221 — **no
  CI-workflow change is needed here.**
- `progress.md` — add a fix-forward entry: §5A.2 Quote PDF repeating-header +
  acceptance page-break fix; recovers commit `70b4d98`, which the PR #221
  squash merge missed.
- `roadmap.md` — the §5A.2 Quote-PDF item is already ✅; leave it. Add a
  changelog line only if the file keeps one.

## Scope discipline

This PR is **only** the header + acceptance CSS fix and the regenerated
samples. No other changes. Do not touch the Variation or Schedule-of-Rates
work (§5A.2 PRs 3–4).
